Extract this bank statement as strict JSON only (no prose, no markdown fence) with keys opening_balance, closing_balance, transactions (a list of {date, description, amount}). Amounts are negative for debits, positive for credits.

Opening balance: 100.00
2026-01-02  Coffee shop        -5.00
2026-01-05  Salary credit      +50.00
2026-01-09  Groceries          -15.00
Closing balance: 130.00
